stemHtml: The pilot of an aeroplane with a single engine and right-turning propeller (clockwise from the pilot’s viewpoint) decides to go around. The pilot raises the nose too much as the power increases and stalls the aircraft. Most probably, the aircraft will…

options.a: spin to the left due to p-factor and the slipstream effect.
options.b: spin to the right due to gyroscopic precession.
options.c: spin to the left due to p-factor and gyroscopic precession.
options.d: stall evenly on both wings due to the balanced propeller effects.
